# Midwest Windmill Company

> Boutique engineering and heritage firm specializing in Aermotor windmills and windmill restoration, water-pumping systems, and custom windmill projects.

## About the Company

Midwest Windmill Company is a premium service provider serving clients nationwide across the United States. We offer professional windmill sales, installation, repair, restoration, and custom tower construction.

## Contact Information
- **Phone:** 660-341-8951
- **Email:** markhenry@midwestwindmillcompany.com
- **Address:** 22275 Youngstown Trail, Kirksville, MO 63501

## Navigation & Pages

- [Home](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/) - Overview of our custom Aermotor windmills, restoration, and installation services.
- [Portfolio](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/portfolio) - Showcase of our completed windmill restoration and installation projects.
- [Services](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services) - Comprehensive index of our custom windmill services.
- [Craftsman](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/craftsman) - Information about our history, craftsmanship, and legacy-grade materials.
- [Pricing](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/pricing) - Price guides for installations, maintenance, restoration, and decor.
- [Consultation](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/consultation) - Book a site assessment or request a custom windmill quote.
- [Legacy Parts](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/legacy-parts) - Ordering authentic Aermotor windmill replacement parts and components.
- [Windmill Decor](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/windmill-decor) - Custom indoor and outdoor windmill decor and yard art.

## Services Directory

We specialize in the following windmill engineering and heritage services:

- [New Windmill Sales & Installation](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/new-windmill-sales-installation) - Premium Aermotor windmill packages.
- [Windmill Pond Aeration Systems](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/windmill-pond-aeration-systems) - Eco-friendly aeration for ponds and lakes.
- [Windmill Water Pumping Systems](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/windmill-water-pumping-systems) - Off-grid water supply solutions.
- [Livestock Water Windmill Systems](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/livestock-water-windmill-systems) - Heavy-duty watering systems for ranches.
- [Aermotor Windmill Repair](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/aermotor-windmill-repair) - Expert diagnostics and repairs for traditional models.
- [Windmill Restoration Services](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/windmill-restoration-services) - Historical restoration of antique windmills.
- [Aermotor Windmill Parts & Supplies](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/aermotor-windmill-parts-supplies) - High-grade original parts catalog.
- [Windmill Gearbox Rebuild & Repair](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/windmill-gearbox-rebuild-repair) - Professional mechanical gearbox servicing.
- [Windmill Tower Construction & Replacement](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/windmill-tower-construction-replacement) - Wood and steel tower building.
- [Windmill Relocation Services](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/windmill-relocation-services) - Safe dismantling, transport, and reassembly.
- [Windmill Annual Maintenance & Oiling](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/windmill-annual-maintenance-oiling) - Yearly preventative care and lubrication.
- [Windmill Decorative Wall Art & Yard Art](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/windmill-decorative-wall-art-yard-art) - Handcrafted decorative windmills.
- [Windmill Hand Pump Installation](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/windmill-hand-pump-installation) - Hand-operated backup water pumps.
- [Storm Damage Windmill Repair](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/storm-damage-windmill-repair) - Emergency wind, storm, and structural restoration.
- [Windmill Consulting & Site Assessment](https://www.midwestwindmillcompany.com/services/windmill-consulting-site-assessment) - Feasibility studies, wind mapping, and site evaluation.
